---
title: "CASL — Complex Adaptive Systems Laboratory"
subtitle: "Director: Ivan I. Garibay · University of Central Florida"
description: "CASL studies AI, complex systems, network science, agent-based modeling, information dynamics, cognitive cybersecurity, and foundation models for large-scale adaptive systems."
---

## About CASL

The **Complex Adaptive Systems Laboratory**, directed by Dr. Ivan I. Garibay, studies **artificial intelligence**, **complex systems**, **network science**, **computational social science**, **agent-based modeling**, **information diffusion**, **misinformation dynamics**, **cognitive cybersecurity**, **innovation ecosystems**, and **large-scale adaptive systems**. CASL develops computational models and data-driven methods for understanding how behavior, information, influence, intelligence, and adaptation emerge across complex systems.

**Lab website:** <https://complexity.cecs.ucf.edu>

## Director

::: {.bm-person-card}
::: {.bm-person-photo}
![Headshot of Ivan I. Garibay](../assets/people/ivan-garibay.jpeg)
:::
### Ivan I. Garibay
[Professor, IEMS · UCF]{.bm-person-role}
[Director, CASL]{.bm-person-affil}

Research in AI, complex adaptive systems, network science, foundation models, large language models, information diffusion, computational social science, and multi-agent systems.

::: {.bm-person-links}
[Profile](../people/faculty.qmd#ivan-i-garibay)
[Email](mailto:Ivan.Garibay@ucf.edu)
[Website](https://www.cs.ucf.edu/~garibay/)
[Lab site](https://complexity.cecs.ucf.edu)
:::
:::

## Connection to BioMIND

Within BioMIND, CASL contributes expertise in **network science**, **complex systems**, **information dynamics**, **agent-based modeling**, **AI explainability**, **foundation models**, **large language models**, and **agentic AI systems**.

## Research themes

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
### Complex adaptive systems
Emergence, adaptation, and modularity across biological and social systems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Network science
Structure and dynamics of large-scale, multilayer, and temporal networks.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Information diffusion
Cascades, narratives, and signal propagation in cyber-social systems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Misinformation dynamics
Detection, characterization, and modeling of misinformation operations.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Agent-based modeling
Simulation of heterogeneous agents and their interactions at scale.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Computational social science
Data-driven and simulation-based study of human collective behavior.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Cognitive cybersecurity
The cognitive and social dimensions of cybersecurity in networked systems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Foundation models and LLMs
Adaptation, evaluation, and application of foundation models and large language models.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### AI for large-scale adaptive systems
Methods that bridge AI and complex-systems modeling for societal and scientific applications.
:::

:::

## People

CASL members are listed centrally on the BioMIND [People](../people/index.qmd) page.

## Publications and news

See the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) and [News](../news/index.qmd) pages for CASL contributions to the BioMIND record.
